key.name: dependency-keys
key.summary: Fields that may identify source datasets for querying dependency graphs.

key.name: local-base-uris
key.summary: Local directories displayed in the base URI list.

key.name: choose-item-download-directory
key.summary: If set, always ask for picking local directory at item download. If unset, always download items to default directory without asking.

key.name: open-downloaded-item
key.summary: If set, always try to open item with associated default application after download.

key.name: base-uri-listing-timeout
key.summary: Timeout in seconds for direct listing of datasets in a base URI. If listing takes longer than this, the operation is cancelled and an error message is shown. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.
